title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 252.321 - Agroforestry demonstration areas established
text:
252.321.  Agroforestry demonstration areas established. — The University of Missouri center for* agroforestry and extension service, in consultation with the director, shall establish agroforestry demonstration areas, and develop and deliver the educational components of sections 252.300 to 252.333.
(L. 1990 H.B. 1653 § 8, A.L. 2001 H.B. 904 merged with S.B. 462) 
*Word "of" appears in original rolls.
